examples.title: Algorithm: HTTP Servlet Request Handling
examples.code:
ALGORITHM HandleHttpRequest
BEGIN
 1. Override doGet(req, res)
 2. Set response content type
 3. Get request parameters
 4. Process business logic
 5. Write response to client
END
examples.explanation:
1. Override HttpServlet's methods
2. Set MIME type for response
3. Access parameters via getParameter()
4. Implement application logic
5. Use PrintWriter for response

examples.title: HttpServlet Implementation Example
examples.explanation:
1. Extends HttpServlet
2. doGet sets content type and writes HTML response
3. Retrieves 'username' parameter
4. doPost delegates to doGet

examples.title: Algorithm: Session Management
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ManageSession
BEGIN
 1. Get existing session or create new
 2. Set session timeout
 3. Store/retrieve session attributes
 4. Invalidate session when done
END
examples.explanation:
1. req.getSession() creates new session
2. setMaxInactiveInterval() for timeout
3. setAttribute()/getAttribute() for data
4. invalidate() clears session

examples.title: Shopping Cart with HttpSession
examples.description: Storing user cart in session attributes
examples.explanation:
1. Creates/reuses session
2. Sets 30-minute timeout
3. Retrieves existing cart or creates new
4. Adds item to cart
5. Updates session attribute

examples.title: Cookie Handling Example
examples.explanation:
1. Creates cookie with theme preference
2. Sets 1 week expiration
3. Adds cookie to response
4. Retrieves cookies from request
5. Searches for specific cookie
